subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-08-10
subcodes.first_line: They are informed too late. The matter is now beyond their criticism and rebuke... Mohammed Ali Pasha had a big, fat camel. When the Hajis started on their long pilgrimage to Mecca
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @stories; anecdotes, @growth of the Cause
